product_overview: A web application for students and hostel administrators to manage meal access, QR-based cafeteria entry, meal history, payments, notifications and administrative operations like room and student management.
core_goals: Allow students to register, sign in, view and present time/meal-specific QR codes for cafeteria access
Enable students to view meal history, payment summary, weekly menu and edit profile information
Allow administrators to view operational dashboards, manage students, rooms, menus, notifications and view reports
Provide an admin QR scanner to validate student meal access and record meal logs

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public landing page for unauthenticated visitors with clear entry points to sign in or register.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View landing page hero section -> Choose to sign in -> Redirected to /login
Navigate to / -> View landing page hero section -> Choose to register -> Redirected to /signup

features.name: User Login
features.description: Email/password authentication that redirects users to the appropriate dashboard based on role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Student Dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form with invalid credentials -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Student Registration
features.description: Student signup flow that captures profile details and creates a student account.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill full name, email, password, student ID and phone -> Submit signup form -> See success notification -> Redirected to Student Dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Leave a required field empty -> Submit signup form -> See client-side validation error notification

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Primary student workspace showing QR code, meal history, payments, notifications, weekly menu and profile editing.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as student -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Student Dashboard -> View QR code for current meal -> View meal history -> View payment summary -> View notifications -> View weekly menu

Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as student -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Student Dashboard -> Choose to edit profile information -> Update profile fields -> Save profile changes -> See updated profile information

features.name: QR Code Generation
features.description: Generates and displays meal- and time-specific QR codes for students to present at the cafeteria.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as student -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Student Dashboard -> View QR code for Breakfast -> Change selected meal type to Lunch -> Observe QR code updates for Lunch

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Overview
features.description: Admin overview presenting high-level statistics for students, payments, rooms and daily meal counts.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View total students and active students -> View payment statistics -> View today's meal counts per meal type -> View room occupancy summary

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Student Management
features.description: Admin functionality to browse, search, update, block/unblock and delete student profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View list of all students -> Search students by name or ID -> Select a student to edit -> Update student profile details -> Save changes -> Update student status to Blocked -> Confirm status shows as Blocked -> Delete a student record -> Confirm student is removed from the list

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Room Management
features.description: Admin can view room list and occupancy, and create, update or remove room entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View list of rooms with occupancy -> Add a new room entry -> Fill room details -> Save new room -> Edit an existing room's details -> Save room updates -> Delete a room entry -> Confirm room no longer appears

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Payment Management
features.description: Admin view of all payment records with filtering by date or student.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View list of all payments -> Filter payments by date range -> Filter payments by student

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Meal Logs
features.description: Admin view and filter all meal access records with student context.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View all meal log entries -> Filter meal logs by date -> Filter meal logs by student name

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Notifications
features.description: Admin can compose and broadcast notifications to all students or target specific students.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> Fill notification title, message and type -> Optionally specify target student ID -> Send notification -> Observe the notification appears in notifications list

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Rules Management
features.description: Admin can create, update and remove hostel rules and announcements.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View list of hostel rules -> Add a new rule -> Fill rule details -> Save new rule -> Edit an existing rule -> Save rule updates -> Delete a rule -> Confirm rule no longer appears

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Menu Management
features.description: Admin updates the weekly meal menu displayed to students.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View current weekly menu -> Edit menu items for a given day -> Save menu changes -> Student navigates to / -> Authenticate as student -> Redirected to Student Dashboard -> View updated weekly menu

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Reports
features.description: Admin charts and aggregates for meal usage and revenue over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> View meal usage bar chart by date -> View revenue line chart by date

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Settings (Profile)
features.description: Admin and students can update profile settings like full name and phone number.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as user -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Dashboard -> Edit full name and phone number -> Save profile changes -> See updated profile information

features.name: QR Scanner (Admin)
features.description: Admin camera-based QR scanner to validate student QR codes and record meal access.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as admin -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Admin Dashboard -> Open QR scanner camera view -> Scan student QR code -> See access granted result with reason -> Observe new meal record appears in meal logs

features.name: Logout
features.description: End the authenticated session and return the user to the public landing page.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as user -> Submit login form -> Redirected to Dashboard -> Initiate logout -> Redirected to /

routes.description: Root route - shows LandingPage if not logged in, AdminDashboard for admins, StudentDashboard for students
Email/password login page for students and admins
Student registration page with student ID, email, full name, phone

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public landing page shown to unauthenticated users with navigation to login/signup
user_interactions: Click Login button to navigate to /login
Click Sign Up button to navigate to /signup

features.name: User Login
features.description: Email and password login via InsForge auth, supports both admin and student roles
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Student Registration
features.description: Student signup form with role auto-assignment based on email domain
user_interactions: Fill full name, email, password, student ID, phone fields

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard with QR code generation, meal history, payment info, notifications, and profile management
user_interactions: View QR code for meal access

features.name: QR Code Generation
features.description: Generates time/meal-specific QR codes for students to present at the hostel cafeteria
user_interactions: View QR code for Breakfast, Lunch, or Dinner
QR code updates based on meal type and time period

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Overview
features.description: Admin overview with statistics on students, payments, rooms, and daily meal counts
user_interactions: View total students, active students, payment stats
View today's meal counts per meal type

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Student Management
features.description: Admin can view, search, update, block/unblock, and delete students
user_interactions: Search students by name or ID

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Room Management
features.description: Admin can view, add, edit, and delete rooms; view room occupancy
user_interactions: View list of rooms with occupancy
Click Add Room to create a new room entry
Click Edit icon to update room details
Click Delete icon to remove a room

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Payment Management
features.description: Admin views all payment records with student name and amount
user_interactions: Filter payments by date or student

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Meal Logs
features.description: Admin views all meal access records with student info
user_interactions: Filter by date or student name

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Notifications
features.description: Admin broadcasts notifications to all or specific students
user_interactions: Fill notification title, message, and type

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Rules Management
features.description: Admin creates and manages hostel rules and announcements

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Menu Management
features.description: Admin updates the weekly meal menu visible to students

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Reports
features.description: Admin views charts for meal counts and revenue over time
user_interactions: View meal usage bar chart by date
View revenue line chart by date

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Settings
features.description: Admin and students can update profile settings

features.name: QR Scanner (Admin)
features.description: Admin scans student QR codes to validate and record meal access
user_interactions: See access granted or denied result with reason

features.name: Logout
features.description: Clears auth session and redirects to landing page
user_interactions: Click Logout button in dashboard nav

known_limitations.issue: Role is determined by email domain (@gmail.com = admin) which is insecure for production
known_limitations.impact: Any gmail user is treated as admin; acceptable for demo/testing environment

known_limitations.issue: Password change requires sign-out and reset-password flow (no in-app password update)
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot change passwords directly from the settings page

known_limitations.issue: Room occupancy calculation is done client-side by cross-referencing profiles
known_limitations.impact: Occupancy count may be inaccurate if room_number field is not consistently set
